message:
refactor(connectors): migrate to BaseConnector for unified metrics

- Add Serialize/Deserialize derives to ConnectorMetrics for serialization support
- Add instance_id field to BaseConnector for per-run tracking
- Migrate anthropic, discord, openai, telegram connectors to use BaseConnector
  instead of individual atomic counters
- Unified metrics collection via base.metrics() and base.record_request()
- Connectors now use base.set_configured() and base.set_handshaken() for state
- Minor formatting fixes to ratelimit tests and fcp-core modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
